creator: epopen@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mathieu Arnold from comment #4)
Hi Mathieu Arnold

Thanks your help.
Build successful after set GSSAPI_NONE @ make config.

GSSAPI problem look like.
As previous comment, I build 9.18.1 without problem with GSSAPI_HEIMDAL as follows.
    /etc/make.conf
        OPTIONS_SET+=GSSAPI_HEIMDAL
    /var/db/ports/dns_bind918/options
        OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GSSAPI_BASE
        OPTIONS_FILE_SET+=GSSAPI_HEIMDAL
        OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GSSAPI_MIT
        OPTIONS_FILE_UNSET+=GSSAPI_NONE
    Ports security/heimdal installed as heimdal-7.7.0_1

Next I tried to debug-krb as follows.
    /usr/ports/dns/bind918 # make debug-krb
    cc -O2 -pipe -march=native  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing  -o /tmp/debug-krb.x -I"/usr/local/include/heimdal"  -lkrb5 -lgssapi -L"/usr/local/lib/heimdal" -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/heimdal  /tmp/debug-krb.c &&  ldd /tmp/debug-krb.x;  /bin/rm -f /tmp/debug-krb.x
/tmp/debug-krb.x:
            libkrb5.so.26 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libkrb5.so.26 (0x800245000)
            libgssapi.so.3 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libgssapi.so.3 (0x8002df000)
            libc.so.7 => /lib/libc.so.7 (0x800320000)
            libasn1.so.8 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libasn1.so.8 (0x800722000)
            libwind.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libwind.so.0 (0x8007d0000)
            libheimbase.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libheimbase.so.1 (0x8007fb000)
            libhx509.so.5 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libhx509.so.5 (0x80080e000)
            libhcrypto.so.4 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libhcrypto.so.4 (0x80085f000)
            libheimsqlite.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libheimsqlite.so.0 (0x8008a1000)
            libcom_err.so.1 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libcom_err.so.1 (0x80099c000)
            libroken.so.18 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libroken.so.18 (0x8009a2000)
            libcrypto.so.11 => /usr/local/lib/libcrypto.so.11 (0x8009b8000)
            libintl.so.8 => /usr/local/lib/libintl.so.8 (0x800cab000)
            libcrypt.so.5 => /lib/libcrypt.so.5 (0x800cb9000)
            libthr.so.3 => /lib/libthr.so.3 (0x800cda000)
            libheimntlm.so.0 => /usr/local/lib/heimdal/libheimntlm.so.0 (0x800d08000)
    PREFIX: /usr/local
    GSSAPIBASEDIR: /usr/local
    GSSAPIINCDIR: /usr/local/include/heimdal
    GSSAPILIBDIR: /usr/local/lib/heimdal
    GSSAPILIBS: -lkrb5 -lgssapi
    GSSAPICPPFLAGS: -I/usr/local/include/heimdal
    GSSAPILDFLAGS: -L/usr/local/lib/heimdal
    GSSAPI_CONFIGURE_ARGS: CFLAGS=-I/usr/local/include/heimdal -O2 -pipe -march=native -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing   LDFLAGS=-L/usr/local/lib/heimdal -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/heimdal:/usr/local/lib -L/usr/local/lib -ljson-c -fstack-protector-strong   LIBS=-lkrb5 -lgssapi -L/usr/local/lib  KRB5CONFIG=/usr/local/bin/krb5-config
    KRB5CONFIG: /usr/local/bin/krb5-config
    CFLAGS: -O2 -pipe -march=native  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector-strong -isystem /usr/local/include -fno-strict-aliasing 
    LDFLAGS: -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/heimdal:/usr/local/lib  -L/usr/local/lib -ljson-c -fstack-protector-strong 
    LDADD:

Result all pretty good look like.
May potential problem in my system?

Thanks a lot.
